_message:
Receive various rewards by collecting event pts during Miracle Collection!
You can receive even more fabulous rewards
by achieving a high rank during the event!

You will receive Miracle Stars as you play through standard songs!
You can then use these Miracle Stars to take on event songs!
Event songs reward a lot more event points than standard songs!

Create teams with the specially-selected members of each event
to more effectively progress through events!

Create teams consisting of specially-selected members with event point bonuses
to gain more event points when clearing live shows!
Idolizing these members will cause their bonuses to be further increased!

Specially-selected members with a Miracle Star bonus
increase the amount of Miracle Stars obtained from the event login bonus!
Idolizing these members will cause their bonuses to be further increased!

You can obtain various rewards by clearing event goals!
Once you have achieved a certain amount of event points, new event stories will be unlocked!

Check out Star Challenges as a way to test out your overall abilities with SIF2
like your pure skill and member enhancement!
Show off what you can do and aim for the top!

Get the target score on all the randomly selected songs to increase your Star Level!
You can get extravagant rewards when your Star Level increases!

Use the Star Assist feature special on Star Challenges
to get unlimited HP, increased skill activation, and more!
Get that ultra high score that you can't normally hit!

Use another Star Assist to boost your score corresponding to your Members' level and skill level.
Enhance your Members and boost your score!
*Targets all Members, even those that are not in your Unit Formation.

In Star Challenges, receive various rewards by increasing
your Star Level and saving up Event Pts.
Get even more awesome rewards by placing high in the rankings!

Increase your Star Level by hitting the target score on all the songs randomly selected for you!
You can get extravagant rewards when your Star Level increases!

Star Challenge rankings are placed according to Star Level!
When two players are at the same Star Level, the one with more Event pts take the lead!
Increase your Star Level and aim for the top!

Use the specially-selected Members of each event
to more effectively progress through events!

Use specially-selected Members to boost your score for event songs!
You can get a bonus effect in Star Challenges even if the Members are not in your unit.
Idolize these Members for an even bigger bonus effect!

Specially-selected Members with a Login Item Bonus
increase the amount of Star Assist Tickets obtained from th event login bonus!
Idolize these Members for an even bigger bonus effect!

During the event, use the Continued Bonus that adds on to up to five Live Shows per day
and the Play Bonus that boosts your score bonus every Live Show
to push the limits of your target score!
